TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ke na thaylu ga ,ungat qu ke ta ita 'Tayal hya,ini ta si pbbawx kmal, mutu ta shkuy kmal; nanu yasa qu bnkis 'tayai ga, Ś§ęŚ¶Ľ ga mutu nha son~ "qutux tnuxan". "qutux tnuxan" spgluw ta mita ke na thelu ga "šłÄŚÄčśěēť†≠" ma imi nya, ke na ita 'Tayal qu "qutux tnuxan" ga, maki sazing imi nya ay! te qutux ga~ usa magal "qutux tnuxan". te sazing ga~ msblaq balay "qutux tnuxan" qasa wah.
S.PHON: ke na tńßajlu …£a ,uŇčat qu ke ta ita Ētajal ńßja,ini ta s~…ēi pő≤ő≤awx kmal, mutu ta s~…ēńßkuj kmal; nanu jas~…ēa qu ő≤nkis~…ē Ētajai …£a, ** …£a mutu nńßa s~…ēon~ "qutux tnuxan". "qutux tnuxan" s~…ēp…£luw ta mita ke na tńßelu …£a "****" ma imi nja, ke na ita Ētajal qu "qutux tnuxan" …£a, maki s~…ēaziŇč imi nja aj! te qutux …£a~ us~…ēa ma…£al "qutux tnuxan". te s~…ēaziŇč …£a~ ms~…ēő≤laq ő≤alaj "qutux tnuxan" qas~…ēa wańß.

"qutux tnuxan" spgluw ta mita ke na thelu ga "šłÄŚÄčśěēť†≠" ma imi nya, ke na ita 'Tayal qu "qutux tnuxan" ga, maki sazing imi nya ay! te qutux ga~ usa magal "qutux tnuxan". te sazing ga~ msblaq balay "qutux tnuxan" qasa wah.
